text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O and Mejiro Ardan tell Yaeno
Muteki about their injuries. It's still uncertain
when—or if—they'll be able to return to the turf.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They're worried that no one will be waiting for
them when they return, so Yaeno Muteki
promises that she'll continue racing to keep their
names in the public mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki and I head to Nakayama
Racecourse to watch the Arima Kinen. Following
her victory, the audience proclaims Oguri Cap the
star of the generation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It fills Yaeno Muteki with rage that no one
mentions her or her friends. She cries that she and
the others who battled for the Classic Triple
Crown are the real stars of the generation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She swears to defeat Oguri Cap and prove that
she and her friends are the ones leading this
generation. She now has the piece that she has
been missing—an obsession.
